task_objective: Resolve the 3 in-plugin updater code review findings: Decky installer argument order, pending update install metadata reconciliation on startup, and release manifest asset name matching the release tag. Additionally, resolve SSL verification failures when checking updates on standard Linux/SteamOS systems and add logging for failed checks.
design_decisions: Changed invokeDeckyInstaller argument order to url, EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAME, version, sha256, installType to match Decky loader frontend contract. Decoupled reconcile_pending_update_install from regular update check context reading (get_update_check_context), performing it exclusively on plugin backend startup (Plugin._main). Added release tag matching to release manifest filename validation in validate_release_candidate to reject generic or incorrect manifest asset names. Resolved urllib SSL validation errors by implementing a _get_ssl_context helper that dynamically attempts to verify certificates using standard Linux/SteamOS system paths. Added service.log logging inside record_update_check_result for failed update checks.
results: All validation checks passed, 427 tests pass cleanly, formatting and type checking verify successfully.
